privacy: No secrets, Steam tickets, private account data, provider tokens, raw live provider output, or private machine paths.
claim_rule: A scenario is a bandwidth regression if bandwidth_kb_s_per_client.p95 exceeds the selected budget key. These are local Foundation gates, not live networking or release promises.
open_limits: No live network transport was measured.
No packet loss, resend, compression, fragmentation, or MTU behavior is included.
Aggregate far-state is still an estimated server-side model and has no binary wire fixture.
No gameplay visibility, fog-of-war, stealth, camera authority, or real Steam state is included.
